name: 離婚宣言打臉
description: 在鞭刑的極端壓迫下，Michelle不屈服反而主動提出離婚。Richard自信她離不開Gallow家族，但Michelle的決絕打碎了他的傲慢。被壓迫者的反擊永遠是最解氣的時刻。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: I want a divorce. ... You have never been on your own without me, without my family, without our money. How do you think you're going to survive? ... For 3 years, I took everything. Every lonely night, every insult. Turns out I'm the fool. Richard Gallow, it is over.
